title: negundo kingii
intro: Negundo kingii, also known as Prickly Acacia, is a plant species native to Australia that belongs to the Mimosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and preventing the growth of bacteria. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The Negundo kingii plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
